Does the player actually have to sign a document?

Yes, players have to sign a document before 11pm.

In the Premier League, a Deal Sheet can only be completed in the final two hours of the transfer window (9pm-11pm).

It must be completed and sent to the Premier League and the Football Association before the close of the window.

If completed in time, transfers can then be concluded by 1am on Friday morning.
